description: 52 - 08-01-2025 - Emails between Mer Thomas (former Chief People Officer, FCDO) and others
text:
Officer, FCDO) and others

From: Mervyn Thomas|[ Personal
Sent: Wed 08/01/2025 1:17:14 PM (UTC)
To: Tim Jones (Dir Finance) Personal ; lan Collard
a Personal ; Corin Robertson Personal 7
Rochelle Fisher! Personal ]; Dominic Schroeder
* Personal
Co: Jcs [ JCS 1]
Subject: RE: PM 'Pre-appointment letter’
Many thanks Tim.
Added.
mervyn

Mervyn Thomas, Chief People Officer, FCDO.
Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office | King Charles Street | London |
SW1A 2AH
Personal | Personal
From: Tim Jones (Dir Finance)
Sent: 08 January 2025 12:29
To: Mervyn Thomas ; lan Collard * ; Corin Robertson ; Rochelle Fisher ; Dominic Schroeder *
ce: JSC
Subject: RE: PM 'Pre-appointment letter’
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
Hi Mervyn
Lines on fiduciary responsibility, project delivery and risk management:
“You will be accountable for good financial management and project delivery across
the US network, ensuring that public money is spent in a regular, proper, feasible and
value for money manner in compliance with Parliament's expectations and the
FCDO’s internal policies. Counter fraud and good risk management are also key
priorities for the department and you will be essential in championing them. You
should set a good tone from the top on the importance of these matters and ensure
that your DHM and teams are adequately trained and resourced to discharge their
roles.”
Tim
Tim Jones (he/him/his pronouns) | Finance Director
Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office | King Charles Street | London |
SW1A 2AH | Mobile: Personal .
Executive Assistant: / Chief of Staff:
JCS

| work flexibly and may send emails outside normal office hours. Please don’t feel you need to
respond outside of your usual working time.

From: Mervyn Thomas Personal >
Sent: 08 January 2025 09:12

172

To: lan Collard * < Personal >; Corin Robertson < Personal >; Tim

Jones (Dir Finance) < Personal >; Rochelle Fisher < Personal >
Dominic Schroeder * < Personal >
c: JSC < JSC >
Subject: RE: PM 'Pre-appointment letter’
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE.
Will add both those points — thanks ian.
mervyn

Mervyn Thomas, Chief People Officer, FCDO
Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office | King Charles Street | London |
SW1A 2AH

+ Personal | Personal

From: lan Collard * < Personal >

Sent: 08 January 2025 08:58

To: Corin Robertson < Personal >; Mervyn Thomas

< Personal >; Tim Jones (Dir Finance) < Personal >; Rochelle Fisher
< Personal >; Dominic Schroeder * < Personal >

c: JSC < JSC >

Subject: Re: PM 'Pre-appointment letter’

Agree there should also be a reference to obtaining the necessary security
clearances.

And is it worth flagging that other documentation explaining accountabilities and
responsibilities will be available through his team, or something like that? As we
discussed yesterday, he also has crisis, H&S, fire safety, line management,
safeguarding responsibilities - and more | imagine.

Best wishes

lan

lan Collard | Chief Property & Security Officer

Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office

King Charles Street | London | SW1A 2AH

Mobile/WhatsApp: Personal

From: Corin Robertson < Personal >

Sent: Wednesday, January 8, 2025 7:18:06 AM

To: Mervyn Thomas < Personal >; Tim Jones (Dir Finance)

< Personal >; lan Collard * < Personal >; Rochelle Fisher

< Personal >; Dominic Schroeder * < Personal >
Cc: Marie Forsyth < JSC >

Subject: Re: PM 'Pre-appointment letter’

Thanks for sharing Mervyn, and to all of you working this through carefully.

173


There will be some terms in here eg DSR, Nolan Principles which won't be familiar to
Lord Mandelson. | presume you’ Il include them as a link or as annexes?

Do we need to refer to the appointment being subject to DV clearance and declaration
of conflicts of interest? Or is that being handled separately?

Thanks

Corin

Sent from Outlook for iOS

From: Mervyn Thomas < Personal >

Sent: Tuesday, January 7, 2025 8:00:04 PM

To: Tim Jones (Dir Finance) < Personal >; lan Collard * < Personal >
Rochelle Fisher < Personal >; Dominic Schroeder *

< Personal >

Ce: Corin Robertson < Personal >; JSC < JSC >

Subject: PM ‘Pre-appointment letter’
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

Dear all
Thank you for joining the call this morning and please see my first cut of the ‘pre-
appointment letter’.
Tim — | have left a pin for you to add more on fiduciary responsibility and related
issues, and others please feel free to chip in.
| will tidy up syntax and flow etc in the morning on then onward share with Rob T and
lain G.
Happy to discuss in the meantime.
mervyn
Mervyn Thomas, Chief People Officer, FCDO.
Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office | King Charles Street | London |
SW1A 2AH

Personal | Personal

174
parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
